html:
The Journal

About

Learning to Build in Public

March 2, 2025

There's something powerful about sharing your work before it's perfect. When I started publishing my projects early, I expected criticism. Instead, I found a community of builders who offered feedback, encouragement, and collaboration.

"The best time to share your work was yesterday. The second best time is now."

Building in public isn't about showing off. It's about learning faster through feedback loops, staying accountable to your goals, and connecting with people on the same journey.

Start small. Share a screenshot. Write a paragraph about what you learned today. The momentum builds from there.

Why Simple Tools Win

February 18, 2025

Every year, new frameworks promise to solve all our problems. And every year, I find myself reaching for the simplest tool that gets the job done. There's wisdom in restraint.

Built with Flowin
